degraded.reason: Docs-only iterate (docs/guide.md). No Python source changed, so unit/integration/e2e suites are not applicable. Verified via the 7-agent correctness audit (file:line evidence per finding), path-canon lints (14 passed / 1 skipped), grep confirmation that all 21 stale target strings are gone and replacements present, and the F0 leak-guard (ALLOW).

Medium-complexity gates satisfied in a docs-appropriate way: external LLM review (Advisory per Override Classes) skipped — the 7 independent verification sub-agents + consolidated ledger are a stronger multi-reviewer pass for a prose-correctness diff; full code-review subagent not run (docs-only diff, no risk flags) — each edit is already backed by a source file:line citation from the audit.
Pre-existing sweep-outbox warning from setup_iterate_worktree (trg-671bb0a2 status append dropped by a prior merge) — unrelated to this change.
